title: physalis heterophylla var. nyctaginea
intro: Physalis heterophylla var. nyctaginea, also known as the woodland ground cherry or eastern winged ground cherry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Physalis heterophylla var. nyctaginea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and have antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
